biography.name: Francesc Mier Pujadó
biography.title: Professional Actor
biography.bio: Versatile actor with comprehensive theatrical training at Plató de Cinema. Experienced in drama, comedy, and emotionally demanding roles. Active in professional theater productions, showcases, and audiovisual work. Fluent in multiple languages with a strong foundation in both stage and on-camera performance.
highlights: Professional theatrical experience with paying audience
Trained in acting at Plató de Cinema (3-year program)
Versatile in drama, comedy, and emotional character work
Experience in theatrical productions and audiovisual figurations
Fluent in English, Spanish, and Catalan
